description_long: This is a freestanding wooden awning structure with a pitched, dark gray shingled roof and a rectangular footprint. The main body is constructed from horizontal wooden planks, with the roof supported by sturdy wooden posts at the corners. One long side features a sliding wooden door, while the opposite side is fully enclosed with wood paneling. The roof extends beyond the supporting posts, providing ample shelter beneath. The overall design is simple and functional, suitable for use as a carport, shelter, or covered outdoor workspace in an urban or residential setting.
description: A freestanding wooden awning with a pitched, shingled roof, supported by posts and featuring a sliding door on one side.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open entrance supported by wooden posts and the triangular gable end of the roof.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the shingled roof and the solid wooden wall beneath.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the fully enclosed wooden wall and the gable end of the roof.
description_view_3: Side view with a visible sliding wooden door and the shingled roof above.
attribute_support_structure_type: fixed frame with posts and beams
